metadata.title: ExampleCo Issued Corridor Assessment Results
metadata.remarks: Synthetic assessment-results style output derived from the ExampleCo public proof bundle.

results.title: ExampleCo issued corridor result
results.description: Result set derived from the public ExampleCo proof bundle.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-201
observations.description: The identity provider export states MFA is required and conditional access is enabled.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-209
observations.description: The identity export shows named accounts required for the scoped infrastructure access plane and no shared administrative accounts present.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-210
observations.description: The architecture export shows customer boundaries enforced, production separated from non-production, and no undeclared cross-environment paths in scope.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-211
observations.description: The identity export shows a minimum password length of at least 12 characters, no maximum-length restriction, and common-password blocking enabled for the scoped accounts.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-212
observations.description: The edge export shows a managed web application firewall attached to the scoped public ingress path, running in blocking mode, with the managed rule set active.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-202
observations.description: The cloud export states audit logging is enabled with a declared retention period.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-213
observations.description: The monitoring export shows the scoped stack forwarding telemetry into the declared central sink with detection rules enabled.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-208
observations.description: The storage export shows encryption enabled across the scoped customer data stores and no unencrypted store present in the declared slice.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-203
observations.description: The training claim is documentary and signed by a named human actor.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-204
observations.description: The restore exercise claim is documentary and signed by a named human actor.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-205
observations.description: The access-review export shows the declared review window was completed for the scoped privileged identities.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-206
observations.description: The access-review closure claim is documentary and signed by the named identity governance owner.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-207
observations.description: The incident-runbook claim is documentary and signed by the named security operations owner.

observations.title: Observation for EX-CLAIM-214
observations.description: The monitoring-operations claim is documentary and signed by the named detection engineering owner.
